title: Proclamation No. 1767, s. 1978
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 1767

DECLARING AS AN URBAN LAND REFORM ZONE A CERTAIN PARCEL OF LAND SITUATED IN QUEZON CITY, METRO MANILA

Pursuant to the authority vested in me by law, I, FERDINAND E. MARCOS, President and Prime Minister of the Philippines, do hereby withdraw from sale, settlement, exploration, development or exploitation and set aside and declare as an Urban Land Reform Zone, as provided for by Presidential Decree No. 1517 declaring Urban Land Reform in the Philippines, a certain parcel of land adjoining the National Government Center site situated in Quezon City, Metro Manila, subject to private rights if any there be, and to the operation of previous proclamations reserving portions thereof for specific purposes, which tract of land is generally described as follows:

A parcel of land situated in Quezon City, Island of Luzon. Bounded on the North along lines 1 to 24 by Novaliches Watershed Reservation, on the East along lines 24 to 41 by Marikina River, on the SE., along lines 41-42 by Capitol Hills Golf Course, on the SW., along lines 42 to 58 by Creek (8-10 m. wide), along lines 58 to 60 by NAWASA AQUEDUCT, and on the NW., along line 60-1 by Desiderio Subdivision. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being S. 64 deg. 40’W., 5,108.40 m. from B.L.L.M. No. 1, Montalban, Rizal;

thence N. 3 deg. 58’W.,  208.93 m. to point 2; thence S. 89 deg. 46’E.,  321.02 m. to point 3; thence S. 45 deg. 31’E.,  142.00 m. to point 4; thence S. 79 deg. 33’E.,  117.96 m. to point 5; thence N. 26 deg. 28’E.,  180.27 m. to point 6; thence N. 86 deg. 12’E.,  255.07 m. to point 7; thence N. 45 deg. 26’E.,  323.02 m. to point 8; thence N. 47 deg. 44’E.,  87.57 m. to point 9; thence N. 9 deg. 37’E.,  157.96 m. to point 10; thence N. 58 deg. 40’W.,  167.98 m. to point 11; thence N. 8 deg. 55’E.,  73.87 m. to point 12; thence N. 65 deg. 14’E.,  80.55 m. to point 13; thence N. 84 deg. 34’E.,  126.04 m. to point 14; thence N. 32 deg. 09’E.,  176.17 m. to point 15; thence N. 55 deg. 04’E.,  328.04 m. to point 16; thence S. 80 deg. 54’E.,  199.86 m. to point 17; thence S. 68 deg. 59’E.,  85.91 m. to point 18; thence S. 58 deg. 54’E.,  299.51 m. to point 19; thence S. 87 deg. 31’E.,  157.06 m. to point 20; thence N. 78 deg. 18’E.,  140.18 m. to point 21; thence N. 49 deg. 17’E.,  35.33 m. to point 22; thence N. 20 deg. 45’E.,  99.76 m. to point 23; thence N. 0 deg. 44’E.,  157.95 m. to point 24; thence S. 0 deg. 15’W.,  101.14 m. to point 25; thence S. 12 deg. 36’E.,  953.95 m. to point 26; thence S. 0 deg. 34’E.,  200.01 m. to point 27; thence S. 41 deg. 38’W.,  240.83 m. to point 28; thence Due South  280.00 m. to point 29; thence S. 64 deg. 46’W.,  480.88 m. to point 30; thence S. 19 deg. 26’W.,  270.42 m. to point 31; thence S. 7 deg. 08’E.,  161.25 m. to point 32; thence S. 26 deg. 34’E.,  145.34 m. to point 33; thence S. 29 deg. 21’W.,  183.58 m. to point 34; thence S. 67 deg. 51’W.,  906.95 m. to point 35; thence S. 7 deg. 43’W.,  744.76 m. to point 36; thence S. 6 deg. 37’E.,  694.62 m. to point 37; thence S. 27 deg. 50’W.,  706.77 m. to point 38; thence S. 52 deg. 04’W.,  1293.22 m. to point 39; thence S. 7 deg. 08’W.,  403.11 m. to point 40; thence S. 28 deg. 33’W.,  387.07 m. to point 41; thence N. 0 deg. 54’W.,  2322.92 m. to point 42; thence N. 0 deg. 26’E.,  825.55 m. to point 43; thence N. 76 deg. 23’E.,  97.74 m. to point 44; thence S. 71 deg. 41’W.,  136.93 m. to point 45; thence N. 59 deg. 02’W.,  116.62 m. to point 46; thence N. 38 deg. 03’W.,  146.03 m. to point 47; thence N. 7 deg. 36’W.,  75.66 m. to point 48; thence N. 40 deg. 53’W.,  148.17 m. to point 49; thence N. 35 deg. 24’E.,  46.62 m. to point 50; thence N. 42 deg. 16’W.,  44.60 m. to point 51; thence N. 12 deg. 37’W.,  68.66 m. to point 52; thence N 37 deg. 52’W.,  57.01 m. to point 53; thence S. 86 deg. 49’W.,  90.14 m. to point 54; thence N. 43 deg. 08’W.,  194.56 m. to point 55; thence N. 19 deg. 52’W.,  88.26 m. to point 56; thence N. 51 deg. 11’W.,  111.66 m. to point 57; thence S. 89 deg. 39’W.,  830.02 m. to point 58; thence Due North  120.00 m. to point 59; thence N. 23 deg. 26’E.,  490.43 m. to point 60; thence N. 68 deg. 34’E.,  424.32 m. to point 61; thence N. 19 deg. 53’E.,  499.80 m. to point 62; thence N. 71 deg. 21’E.,  406.36 m. to point 63; thence N. 19 deg. 39’E.,  817.63 m. to point 64; thence N. 71 deg. 02’E.,  169.19 m. to point 65; thence N. 37 deg. 36’E.,  1016.08 m. to the point of beginning, containing an area of One Thousand Three Hundred Thirty-four (1,334) Hectares approximately.

(NOTE: These data are approximate and subject to future survey)

The disposition, construction, development and/or alteration of any part of the area defined above not subject to the proclamation reserving a portion thereof for the National Government Center is hereby prohibited and become subject to such regulations, conditions and/or plans to be formulated by an Urban Land Reform Coordinating Council headed by the Minister of Human Settlements and approved by the President and Prime Minister.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 11th day of August, in the year of Our Lord, Nineteen hundred and seventy-eight.

(SGD . )FERDINAND E. MARCOS President of the Philippines

By the President:

(SGD.) JUAN C. TUVERA Presidential Assistant

Source: CDAsia
